baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-dispatch-scatter-pass37-baseline-20260603 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- 'vmap_scatter/batched_indices_updates' --sample-size 30 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

lever.description: Special-case repeated rank-1 scatter operand initialization when every operand literal is identical, using vec![first; output_len] instead of extending the operand slice once per batch.

tests.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-dispatch-scatter-pass37-test-20260603 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-dispatch scatter -- --nocapture

clippy.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-dispatch-scatter-pass37-clippy-20260603 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-dispatch --all-targets -- -D warnings

isomorphism.ordering: row-major input traversal and batch-major output layout preserved
isomorphism.tie_breaking: duplicate scatter indices keep the last update in traversal order
isomorphism.floating_point: not applicable; integral overwrite scatter only

after.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-dispatch-scatter-pass37-after-20260603 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- 'vmap_scatter/batched_indices_updates' --sample-size 30 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

decision.reason: The candidate did not produce a real win. It regressed against the pass baseline and also failed to beat the earlier same-worker profile row on vmi1153651.
